neighborhoods.name: Puerto Viejo Centro
neighborhoods.description: Caribbean reggae-infused town center with surf shops, Rasta bars, and a multicultural beach scene
neighborhoods.character: Bohemian beach town, Caribbean culture, bike-friendly

housing.predominantType: Small houses, cabins, and apartments above shops

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Puerto Viejo de Talamanca. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Puerto Viejo de Talamanca

neighborhoods.name: Playa Cocles
neighborhoods.description: Stretch of beach south of town with jungle-backed properties and surf breaks

housing.predominantType: Beach houses, eco-cabins, and boutique properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Puerto Viejo de Talamanca's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Puerto Viejo de Talamanca

neighborhoods.name: Bribri
neighborhoods.description: Indigenous community inland with very affordable living and access to Bribri culture
neighborhoods.character: Rural indigenous, very affordable, cultural heritage
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Puerto Viejo de Talamanca

neighborhoods.name: Playa Chiquita
neighborhoods.description: Upscale stretch between Cocles and Manzanillo with international restaurants and eco-lodges

housing.predominantType: Tropical houses, eco-lodges, and custom-built homes

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Puerto Viejo de Talamanca
